basic_details.job_title: CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 34 Project Associate, JRF & Project Assistant Posts (Advt No. PME/P84/2026)
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR - Institute of Minerals and Materials Technology (CSIR-IMMT), Bhubaneswar
basic_details.job_type: Purely temporary, project-based (co-terminus with project duration or max. 6 years cumulative)
basic_details.job_location: CSIR-IMMT, Bhubaneswar, Odisha (with possible travel/stay elsewhere as per project needs)
basic_details.short_information: CSIR - Institute of Minerals and Materials Technology (CSIR-IMMT), Bhubaneswar, has released Advertisement No. PME/P84/2026 (dated 6 July 2026) inviting online applications from bonafide Indian citizens for 34 project positions. These posts are purely temporary and co-terminus with the duration of the respective research project, spanning disciplines such as Chemistry, Physics, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, Electronics/Electrical Engineering, Material Science, Biotechnology/Microbiology, and Environmental Science. The online application window closes

important_dates.interview_date: 28 July 2026 (Chemistry, Physics, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering)

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for all 34 posts is 35 years, as on the last date of receipt of application (19 July 2026). | Relaxation is as per Government of India instructions issued from time to time. Date of birth will be accepted as per the High School Certificate or equivalent, and cannot be changed once claimed.

salary_details.details: Monthly emoluments vary by post, ranging from Rs. 20,000 + HRA@20% (Project Assistant-II) to Rs. 37,000 + HRA@20% (Junior Research Fellow, post 8425). Several posts (8414 to 8417, 8428, 8429) carry a two-tier emolument structure: a higher rate for candidates who have qualified CSIR-UGC/ICAR/ICMR/NET (including lectureship/assistant professorship), GATE, or an equivalent national-level examination conducted by a Central Government department such as DBT/DST, and a lower rate for candidates who do not meet this qualification. Post 8424 (Project Fellow) carries a consolidated emolument of Rs. 30,000/- with no separate HRA. See the Vacancy Details table above for exact figures per post.

selection_process: Applications will be screened for shortlisting as per criteria fixed by the Competent Authority. Merely fulfilling the essential qualification does not by itself entitle a candidate to be called for interview. No written examination is mentioned in the notification - shortlisted candidates will be called for a walk-in interview at CSIR-IMMT
based on their subject/branch (see the Interview Schedule table below). No separate interview call letter will be issued
and no TA/DA is admissible for appearing at the interview.
how_to_apply: Visit the registration/application portal at rects.immt.res.in
Fill in the online application form
Take a printout of the application form after successful submission
Candidates applying for more than one post must apply separately for each post code
Report for the walk-in interview at CSIR-IMMT, Bhubaneswar, on the tentative date assigned to your subject/branch, with all required original documents
For any queries related to the application, candidates may email [email protected] on or before 17 July 2026 (up to 4:00 PM).

content_sections.heading: CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Interview dates are tentative; any change will be communicated to shortlisted candidates only through the CSIR-IMMT website. Candidates are advised to check the website regularly.

rows.date: 28 July 2026 (Chemistry, Physics, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering)
29 July 2026 (Metallurgical Engineering/Material Science, Electronics/Electrical Engineering, Biotechnology/Microbiology/Environmental Science)

content_sections.heading: CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details and Eligibility (Post-wise)
content_sections.text: All 34 posts carry a maximum age limit of 35 years, reckoned as on 19 July 2026 (the last date of receipt of application). Job requirement/desirable qualification varies by post - covering areas such as chemical synthesis, material characterization, coatings, hydrometallurgy, plasma physics, biosurfactants, CAD/3D printing, and battery management systems. Candidates should refer to the full notification for the exact desirable qualification tied to each post code.

content_sections.heading: CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for all 34 posts is 35 years, as on the last date of receipt of application (19 July 2026). Relaxation is as per Government of India instructions issued from time to time. Date of birth will be accepted as per the High School Certificate or equivalent, and cannot be changed once claimed.

content_sections.heading: CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026: Emoluments
content_sections.text: Monthly emoluments vary by post, ranging from Rs. 20,000 + HRA@20% (Project Assistant-II) to Rs. 37,000 + HRA@20% (Junior Research Fellow, post 8425). Several posts (8414 to 8417, 8428, 8429) carry a two-tier emolument structure: a higher rate for candidates who have qualified CSIR-UGC/ICAR/ICMR/NET (including lectureship/assistant professorship), GATE, or an equivalent national-level examination conducted by a Central Government department such as DBT/DST, and a lower rate for candidates who do not meet this qualification. Post 8424 (Project Fellow) carries a consolidated emolument of Rs. 30,000/- with no separate HRA. See the Vacancy Details table above for exact figures per post.

content_sections.heading: CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Applications will be screened for shortlisting as per criteria fixed by the Competent Authority. Merely fulfilling the essential qualification does not by itself entitle a candidate to be called for interview. No written examination is mentioned in the notification - shortlisted candidates will be called for a walk-in interview at CSIR-IMMT, Bhubaneswar, based on their subject/branch (see the Interview Schedule table below). No separate interview call letter will be issued, and no TA/DA is admissible for appearing at the interview.

content_sections.heading: CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026: Interview Schedule
content_sections.text: Interview dates are tentative. Any change in date or time will be communicated to shortlisted candidates only through the CSIR-IMMT website - candidates are advised to check the website regularly.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026 Interview
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates must report at CSIR-IMMT with the following documents in original: Printout of the online application form Any ID proof (Aadhaar Card / Voter ID Card / PAN Card / Passport / Driving License) Mark sheets and certificates of all years and semesters, from 10th/Matriculation onwards (including CGPA-to-percentage conversion certificate, if applicable) Category/EWS Certificate (if applicable) No Objection Certificate (if applicable, for currently employed candidates) Experience Certificate (if applicable)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the registration/application portal at rects.immt.res.in Complete the one-time registration Fill in the online application form Take a printout of the application form after successful submission Candidates applying for more than one post must apply separately for each post code Report for the walk-in interview at CSIR-IMMT, Bhubaneswar, on the tentative date assigned to your subject/branch, with all required original documents For any queries related to the application, candidates may email [email protected] on or before 17 July 2026 (up to 4:00 PM).

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 19 July 2026 at 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 34 vacancies across 34 project positions (Post Codes 8401 to 8434), spanning Chemistry, Physics, and multiple engineering and science disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years for all posts, as on 19 July 2026. Age relaxation is 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there a written exam for CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No written examination is mentioned in the notification. Selection is through screening followed by a walk-in interview at CSIR-IMMT, Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q5. When is the CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026 interview?
faq.answer: The tentative interview dates are 28 July 2026 (for Chemistry, Physics, Mechanical Engineering, and Chemical Engineering posts) and 29 July 2026 (for Metallurgical Engineering/Material Science, Electronics/Electrical Engineering, and Biotechnology/Microbiology/Environmental Science posts), with reporting time between 9:00 AM and 10:30 AM.

faq.question: Q6. Can I apply for more than one post in CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, but candidates must apply separately for each post code they wish to be considered for.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent position at CSIR-IMMT?
faq.answer: No. All 34 positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the duration of the respective project, or a maximum of 6 years of cumulative engagement, whichever is earlier. This engagement does not provide any right or claim to regularization for a permanent CSIR post.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to carry for the CSIR-IMMT interview?
faq.answer: A printout of the online application, a valid ID proof, mark sheets and certificates from 10th/Matriculation onwards, and - where applicable - Category/EWS certificate, NOC, and Experience certificate.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for CSIR-IMMT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 19 July 2026 at 5:00 PM.
